flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 32% at University of Puerto Rico-Arecibo vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.8k vs 4.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Puerto Rico-Arecibo fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Puerto Rico-Arecibo rose 56% between 2021 and 2024 (9.5% → 14.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Puerto Rico-Arecibo rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (44.8% → 52.0%).
